title: rubus subtercanens
intro: Rubus subtercanens, also known as Himalayan Raspberry or Himalayan Strawberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and reduce fever. The health benefits of Rubus subtercanens include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is also used in jams, jellies, and other food products due to its sweet and slightly tart flavor.
